description_long: This object is a small, fixed-wing airplane with a straight, high-mounted wing configuration and a compact fuselage. The wings are broad and rectangular, extending symmetrically from the central body, with metallic-looking tips. The fuselage is primarily a light tan color, with a cockpit area situated at the front and a tail section that rises slightly above the main body. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, all appearing robust and blocky. The engine is mounted at the nose, with a visible propeller assembly. The tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design.
description: A small, tan airplane with high-mounted straight wings, a front propeller engine, and a conventional tail. The landing gear is fixed and robust, and the cockpit is positioned at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad wingspan, central propeller engine, and main landing gear beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the cockpit at the front, and the tail section with its stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the tail wheel, rear fuselage, and the engine at the nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single seat visible at the front of the fuselage.
